name: @tootallnate/uasset
description: Header-level parser for Unreal Engine `.uasset` / `.umap` packages. Decodes the FPackageFileSummary, name table, import table, export table, and soft-object references — enough to identify what an asset IS (class, dependencies, key properties) without trying to deserialise the property bodies (which would require schema knowledge of every UE class).
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
